experience.position: Senior AI Partner Engineer II (Forward Deployed Engineer)
achievements: Lead 0-to-1 AI and automation development, partnering with cross-functional teams to transform ambiguous processes into robust, scalable, enterprise-grade intelligence systems.

experience.position: Senior Software Engineer, AI Platform Ops
achievements: Own the AI Ops function for an internal AI platform powering 2,000+ dev and prod workflows, directing ~18K automated executions monthly (~1.13M + lifetime) across product, regulatory compliance, CX, and agent orchestration.

Defined an enterprise governance framework for ~7,000 automations, including a FinOps algorithm for cost-benefit analysis. Managed multi-agent audits for 1,900+ processes, mitigating security risks like credential leaks to guide leadership strategy.
Developed an autonomous AI code-review verdict subsystem (29 PRs) managing ~86K reviews for 700+ repos; patched security flaws to verify check execution before honoring verdicts.
Orchestrated AI SDLC execution for 23 epics and resolved 414 tickets with an 80% resolution rate within one week.

Improved annual Deposit CSAT from 72.7% to 77.8% (+5.1 points) through refined research methods and detractor oversampling; identified a perceived-failure gap that shifted the roadmap to focus on error communication.
Led “My Stat Sheet” from insight to launch — 30% engagement across 13M+ visits in year one, growing to ~46% across 21M+ visits in year two (+52% YoY engagement).
Synthesized CSAT and player safety data to highlight credit-card deposit risks, providing the evidence base for the company’s transition away from credit-card funding.
Directed multi-phase responsible-gaming research, reframing player protection as a brand driver to guide messaging and tooling strategy.
Established a continuous product-intelligence workflow built on session replays and quantified behavioral signals, accelerating decision-making for teams shipping customer-facing financial tools.
Architected a multi-system web infrastructure and redesigned the digital journey for a venue serving 20k+ monthly visitors, using multi-method research to optimize user flow.
Executed end-to-end product design for SMBs and non-profits, translating research into technical specs and flows that drove a 46% increase in patient bookings.
Directed the full delivery lifecycle across diverse client portfolios, ensuring rigorous technical feasibility and on-time implementation.
